VG · MISSION PROFILE
Mission Profile

Engineering the mirror between real and simulated.

I'm a robotics and digital twin engineer focused on autonomous systems for factories, underground environments and space robotics. My work connects physical robots with simulation pipelines using ROS/ROS 2, MATLAB, Unreal Engine, MuJoCo and machine learning.

At IIT Madras I built digital-twin frameworks, ROS-integrated autonomous systems and ML-driven predictive-maintenance models for Industry 4.0 factories. Today, as a PhD researcher in Aerospace Engineering at the University of Arizona, I work on GPS-denied autonomy, XR–robotics pipelines and robotic concepts for lunar lava-tube environments.

4+

Systems Built
Research & Practice

Three domains, one throughline.

Everything I build lives at the seam between hardware and simulation — where a physical machine and its digital twin move as one.

01 / SPACE

Space & Aerospace Robotics

Autonomous assembly and mobility systems for extreme terrain — lunar lava-tube exploration, bio-storage placement, and quadruped/spider platforms for planetary surfaces.

Lunar ArkISSC / IACFusion 360
02 / TWINS

Digital Twins & Industry 4.0

Production-grade digital twins for robotic arms, presses and AGV fleets — with real-time condition monitoring, edge analytics and ML-based predictive maintenance.

ROSSCADA / IIoTPredictive ML
03 / AUTONOMY

Autonomous Navigation & XR

GPS-denied drone navigation, SLAM, and closed-loop XR–robotics pipelines connecting Meta Quest 3, Unreal Engine 5 and ROS 2 for operator-in-the-loop control.

ROS 2Unreal 5MuJoCo · RL
Featured Mission · Lunar Ark

Lowering life into the Moon's lava tubes.

A track-driven spider robot with a fixed crane arm, designed to autonomously assemble, pick and place cryogenic bio-storage modules deep inside lunar lava tubes — sheltering preserved species from the surface's radiation and temperature extremes for the long haul.

5 m
Crane Boom
360°
Rotation
10 t
Max Payload
Track
Mobility
IAC-24-A5.IP.23 · ISSC 2024 · Advisor: Dr. Jekan Thangavelautham
Featured Mission · XR Mine Exploration

Flying blind through GPS-denied caves.

A closed-loop XR–robotics pipeline linking Meta Quest 3, Unreal Engine 5, MATLAB and ROS 2 — enabling immersive operator-in-the-loop and fully autonomous drone flight across photo-realistic, GPS-denied cave and mine terrain for underground mapping and inspection.

ROS 2

UE5
Simulation
XR

GPS-Denied
Navigation
Ongoing · Advisor: Dr. Enikov

LR-01

Lunar Ark — Spider Robot

Robotic placement concept for cryogenic bio-storage modules inside lunar lava tubes, including track-driven carriage motion, 360° rotation and heavy-payload crane handling.

RoleMission concept, mechanism layout and robotic pick-and-place architecture.
EvidenceIAC Lunar Ark case-study contribution, CAD concept and payload-handling system design.

2026→ Inspection Robot
WR-04
WR-04

Wall-Climbing Inchworm Inspection Robot

CERN-inspired inspection robot concept for metallic beams and vertical surfaces using inchworm locomotion, switchable adhesion and compact jointed body motion.

RoleMuJoCo model development, gait logic, adhesion switching and gripper concept design.
EvidenceView-only MuJoCo models, 3-joint configuration studies and hybrid suction/gecko gripper concepts.
